title: U.S. Department of the Treasury Releases Final Rules for Clean Hydrogen Production Tax Credit
content: The U.S. Treasury and IRS have finalized Section 45V Clean Hydrogen Tax Credit rules, ensuring clarity, flexibility, and investment certainty while emphasizing on GHG limits to remain below 4 kg COâ‚‚e per kg. The rules extend annual time-matching by two years, mandate hourly matching by 2030, and expand incrementality pathways for nuclear, CCS, and state-capped power. For methane-based hydrogen, they refine methane leakage assessments, broaden RNG sources, and introduce a book-and-claim system by 2027. Projects can lock in 45VH2-GREET models at construction, fostering clean hydrogen growth and U.S. leadership in the sector.
author: Analysts Account
